sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39159" key="e)pidermati/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-δερμᾰτίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n39159.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λέμμα</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">peel</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Erot.</author></bibl></sense><sense n="II" id="n39159.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense">. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">skin</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αἰγός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
